ha9e3995fgfc98g40efg9e71g81440ba8ab07: I knew Kagha was desperate, but I never imagined she'd get Cloakwood involved.
h02a1ccdeg8347g4fbag9398gc90070cac8aa: And it cost her her life. What a waste.
h07181214g3affg40b4gbf68gefd16f4b1359: A waste? Don't you think she deserved it?
h71bb051dge20bg4ee2g8e86gb74908042c9d: I could have forgiven her scheming. But the child...
hf3018834g056eg48eeg9fc8g863e1deb6fa3: She meant to kill that poor girl. There's no coming back from that.
hd0a070fbg67a4g4da9gb81fg7ad095cbffbf: I'm looking for a healer - help me narrow the search?
h36a0e00cgf696g47e2g855dgd830dcdb9ec7: Find Nettie in her room. Through the carved door, deeper in the grove.
h5b6b5f8eg6c10g4eb2g856fg58d0f9612ff0: You pulled her from the brink. She owes you her life.
h6abb8912g0123g4886g87a9gce5e24c6bf5a: You've known her longer - has she really changed?
h5097302fgf91cg43fdgb126g3a1dbba17efc: By all appearances, yes - when I look at her, I see the Kagha I once knew.
hd48b3945gb0fag4544gae15g697e8ad9684c: But it could be another lie. I pray it isn't.
ha92eec36g7249g4ae5g8777g8ff84ae75acb: I'm looking for a healer - help me narrow the search?
h988290bfg6136g4096gb42bg1e26c260c3fb: Shadow druids... I still can't believe it.
h1c5efdbbg7933g4544ga0bfg93c473e3cc34: I'm looking for a healer - help me narrow the search?
h826b057dge437g4a79ga428g0a626b71adeb: What were you saying to that bird?
heb4ac5a8g60bfg47ddg9401g6f8bb440a22f: The bird knows. She needs to know. You do not.
h69ab6753g3c03g4d80gbc4dg18ba0c05011f: I'm not with these other tieflings - I'm a druid. You can speak freely.
hc4869228g1765g4793ga6d0gefcda3b0f54b: More follow Kagha every day. They are afraid and she offers a simple solution - eject the refugees and we will be safe.
hf7cbef3dg9647g4204ga711g46922487ef06: Perhaps not. But that does not make it right.
hef394f8fgf51ag4c99ga64ag7c70173a66f6: Only Master Halsin can stop this. I pray my bird returns with news of him.
h9c31b9d4g73b8g4d30g8dc4g6d7a354b7e08: If not, I fear for everyone here.
haada2c6bg3bbcg43e5gbce9g5de69b1c0435: If not, I fear for my people.
h710303dfg05c9g4257g8894g057b5a0d838f: He left with the adventurers. They went treasure hunting in an old temple near here.
h19c14064gc29fg410fg9700g60ec8405c943: Master Halsin did not chase treasure. I do not know what he was chasing. But he never returned.
hd014d563g0d3cg41bega612g26f0dbdefa16: Are there any healers in this place?
h8b49c149g7bbbg4d25gbe36g67d56973464d: Shouldn't the ritual protect the grove? You're not helping the others prepare it.
h42c0bbdcg16c7g4659g870bg91160d0d5577: The ritual is Kagha's decision. But she is not our leader.
hb954e573gae81g4272g9e1bgaa7ed96a73d7: Master Halsin welcomed the refugees in. I wait for him to resolve this.
h11c2c9efgb101g432dg943dgf2ce577a7709: I hear a ritual can protect the grove. Are you helping prepare it?
h4b1451f3ga7f0g481cg970fga187a3b10a0a: But if Master Halsin does not return, Kagha will give the order. And my voice will not matter.
h98b55549g36adg4c62gbcfdg135f52e44bd5: Sounds like she has to be stopped. How would we do that?
had8e436fg567dg4f29gbe4dg8a1791f40740: A druid and an outsider? We can do nothing without turning the others against us.
hefb81e98g7a11g40b2g9ff9g6909aa981d4b: You still haven't told me what you were doing with that bird.
h13a0c876g75b9g443cg8309g24674ed34172: It searches for news of Master Halsin. Only he can set this right.
hd751e413g1408g4e25g9f28g03ee9794163d: If he is gone - well, pray that he is not.
ha9ae14a5gc3c3g42e6g9c93gf90870c2d352: Come now - surely a fellow druid is entitled to know.
h1aa3e9c0g6274g492bga3e5g4b3e7a06daf9: I- forgive me. My love for my brethren is strong, but 'trust'? It is delicate.
h6c0a4b49g49a8g4630g9645gb56674effb62: I'm not with the other tieflings, if that's what worries you.
hfac8d415g70c1g4d3agb7fdg7bc49b0e7dc0: I- forgive me. I don't fear your blood, tiefling. I fear my brethren.
hadbb6ff1gdb98g4b8fgb48cg32020ee1e9f4: Hmm...Suspicious. Do the other druids know? Because I could tell them.
h19a31a93g9b12g4f70g8cd3gd4e706d651e5: We may talk, but - I do not trust my brethren.
hd9b964fdg3ec4g435fgad8dg1ff183ae582f: Before you do that, see how our First Druid treats outsiders. Then decide if you would put your faith in her.
h9a2d909fg3813g47eagb0d7gd2b78465b82c: I helped defend this grove - I'm not your enemy.
h633a043egb3b8g46f9gbf98g534c67d5594c: I - forgive me. It is not you I fear, it is my brethren.
h51811d3bga89dg43fcgbcd3g328492361d59: Not all enemies are outside our walls.
h43254edag3f03g4747gb555g791ee6700f98: I'm looking for a healer - help me narrow the search?
hd133b362gfe01g4110g95c0gc721e405a937: It doesn't look like you're helping with the ritual.
h6c8c8eb2g3522g457ag96ddg567de7505a11: Is that why you were talking with that bird?
h0cbd2875g4f5eg47b0gaae2gd13b27f4a701: Halsin won't be resolving anything if he's dead.
ha0b1640dg11e2g4dfdg85e3gaa8ab2de7ffb: Pray he is not. For the refugees' sake.
hf60477f3g7782g44cbg8593gbced8bc91fc3: Are you helping to prepare for the ritual?
